title: Gironniera scabrida

The health benefits of Gironniera scabrida include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of respiratory infections, such as sinusitis and bronchitis. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and coumarins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Gironniera scabrida is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, headache, and digestive issues.
